config.providers.id_help: Unique identifier (e.g. main, vision-ollama). Lowercase, hyphens allowed.
config.providers.type_help: Provider type determines API compatibility and auto-fills the Base URL.
config.providers.keep_existing_key: Leave empty to keep the existing key.
config.providers.oauth_auth_url_help: OAuth2 authorization endpoint of the provider.
config.providers.keep_existing_secret: Leave empty to keep existing secret.
config.providers.url_empty_error: Base URL must not be empty.
config.providers.id_exists: A provider with this ID already exists.
config.providers.hint.ollama: API Key is optional for Ollama.
config.providers.hint.google: API Key from Google AI Studio.
config.providers.no_pricing_found: No pricing data found for this provider.
config.providers.hint.workers_ai: Cloudflare API Token with Workers AI permissions.
config.providers.account_id_help: Your Cloudflare Account ID (found in the dashboard URL or API settings).
config.providers.account_id_empty_error: Account ID is required for Workers AI.
config.providers.workers_ai_url_auto: URL is auto-generated from Account ID.
config.providers.manifest_url_auto: URL is resolved from Manifest settings.
config.providers.hint.manifest: Uses the Manifest integration settings. In managed mode AuraGo talks to the internal sidecar.
config.providers.hint.yepapi: API Key from YepAPI dashboard. Base URL should be https://api.yepapi.com/v1/ai for LLM chat.
config.providers.hint.llamacpp: No API key required for local llama.cpp.
config.providers.hint.lmstudio: No API key required for LM Studio.
config.providers.empty_key_confirm: Warning: The API Key field is empty. Do you want to save this provider anyway?
config.providers.oauth_connect_hint: AuraGo opens the provider login and keeps tokens safely in the vault.
config.providers.oauth_started: Login opened. Complete it in the browser.
config.providers.oauth_paste_placeholder: Paste the final redirect URL here
config.providers.oauth_paste_help: Use this if the browser ends on localhost or cannot reach AuraGo.
config.providers.oauth_save_first: Save the provider before connecting it.
config.providers.oauth_redirect_uri_help: Register this exact callback URL in the provider's OAuth app.
config.providers.oauth_popup_blocked: The login popup was blocked. Use the direct link below.
config.providers.oauth_connect_unavailab: Complete the OAuth fields before connecting.
config.providers.oauth_endpoint_required: OAuth2: Auth URL and Token URL are required for custom endpoints.
config.providers.oauth_browser_hint: AuraGo uses the known OAuth endpoints for this provider. Add the client details, then save and connect in the browser.
config.providers.oauth_advanced_help: Only change these values for custom OAuth apps or providers without a built-in preset.
config.providers.oauth_setup_provider_se: Open the provider setup link, create or select an OAuth app, and paste the Redirect URI shown here into the authorized Redirect/Callback URL field.
config.providers.oauth_setup_custom_prov: Oh-My-Pi has no concrete setup data for this provider. Open the provider's OAuth app and paste the Redirect URI shown here into its Callback URL field.
config.providers.oauth_setup_redirect_st: Copy the Redirect URI shown here into the provider's authorized Redirect/Callback URL field.
config.providers.oauth_setup_credentials: Enter the Client ID and optional Client Secret from that OAuth app here.
config.providers.oauth_setup_save_connec: Click Save & connect; AuraGo saves the provider and opens the login.
config.providers.oauth_setup_connect_ste: Click Connect provider; AuraGo opens the login and watches for the callback.
config.providers.oauth_setup_callback_st: Complete the provider login. AuraGo stores the token automatically; if the browser stays on localhost, paste the final address into the manual completion field.
config.providers.oauth_direct_retry_help: If the login tab did not open or was closed, open it again here.
config.providers.oauth_setup_catalog_hin: AuraGo uses setup data from {{source}}. Open {{console}} and enter the Redirect URI shown here.
config.providers.oauth_setup_no_catalog_: Oh-My-Pi has no setup data for {{provider}}. Use OAuth here only if you know this provider's settings.
config.providers.oauth_setup_redirect_st: Paste the Redirect URI shown here into the provider field named “{{field}}”.
config.providers.oauth_setup_credentials: Copy “{{clientId}}” and optionally “{{clientSecret}}” from that OAuth app into AuraGo.
